title: clausena wallichii var. guillauminii
intro: Clausena wallichii var. guillauminii, also known as the Thai starfruit or Chinese plum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It is a type of citrus fruit that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as acting as an antioxidant and anti-cancer agent. Clausena wallichii var. guillauminii can be prepared as a tea, juice, or extract, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
